initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.EntStageName, c.CustLastName
FROM Entertainers e
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es ON e.EntertainerID = es.EntertainerID
JOIN Customers c ON 1=1
JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON c.CustomerID = mp.CustomerID
WHERE es.StyleStrength <= 3
  AND mp.PreferenceSeq <= 3
  AND (
    (es.StyleID = mp.StyleID AND es.StyleStrength = mp.PreferenceSeq)
    OR
    (es.StyleID = mp.StyleID AND es.StyleStrength = mp.PreferenceSeq + 1 AND mp.PreferenceSeq = 1)
    OR
    (es.StyleID = mp.StyleID AND es.StyleStrength = mp.PreferenceSeq - 1 AND es.StyleStrength = 1)
  )
  AND (
    -- Ensure first and second preferences/strengths match in either order
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
      JOIN Musical_Preferences mp2 ON es2.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND mp2.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE es2.StyleStrength <= 3 AND mp2.PreferenceSeq <= 3
        AND (
          (es2.StyleStrength = 1 AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 1 AND es2.StyleID = mp2.StyleID)
          OR
          (es2.StyleStrength = 2 AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2 AND es2.StyleID = mp2.StyleID)
        )
    )
    AND
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Entertainer_Styles es3
      JOIN Musical_Preferences mp3 ON es3.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND mp3.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE es3.StyleStrength <= 3 AND mp3.PreferenceSeq <= 3
        AND (
          (es3.StyleStrength = 2 AND mp3.PreferenceSeq = 1 AND es3.StyleID = mp3.StyleID)
          OR
          (es3.StyleStrength = 1 AND mp3.PreferenceSeq = 2 AND es3.StyleID = mp3.StyleID)
        )
    )
  );

SELECT DISTINCT e.EntStageName, c.CustLastName
FROM Entertainers e
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es ON e.EntertainerID = es.EntertainerID
JOIN Customers c ON c.CustomerID IN (
    SELECT mp.CustomerID
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    WHERE mp.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    AND mp.PreferenceSeq <= 3
)
JOIN Musical_Preferences mp ON c.CustomerID = mp.CustomerID
WHERE es.StyleStrength <= 3
AND mp.PreferenceSeq <= 3
AND (
    (es.StyleID = mp.StyleID AND es.StyleStrength = mp.PreferenceSeq)
    OR (
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
            JOIN Musical_Preferences mp2 ON es2.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND mp2.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE es2.StyleStrength <= 3
            AND mp2.PreferenceSeq <= 3
            AND es.StyleID = mp2.StyleID
            AND es2.StyleID = mp.StyleID
            AND es.StyleStrength = mp2.PreferenceSeq
            AND es2.StyleStrength = mp.PreferenceSeq
        )
    )
)
AND (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Entertainer_Styles es3
    WHERE es3.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID
    AND es3.StyleStrength <= 3
) <= 3
AND (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp3
    WHERE mp3.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    AND mp3.PreferenceSeq <= 3
) <= 3;

SELECT DISTINCT e.EntStageName, c.CustLastName
FROM Entertainers e
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es ON e.EntertainerID = es.EntertainerID
JOIN Customers c ON c.CustomerID IN (
    SELECT mp.CustomerID
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    WHERE mp.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    AND mp.PreferenceSeq <= 3
)
WHERE es.StyleStrength <= 3
AND (
    -- Match first preference with first strength, second with second
    (SELECT mp1.StyleID FROM Musical_Preferences mp1 WHERE mp1.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND mp1.PreferenceSeq = 1) = 
    (SELECT es1.StyleID FROM Entertainer_Styles es1 WHERE es1.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND es1.StyleStrength = 1)
    AND
    (SELECT mp2.StyleID FROM Musical_Preferences mp2 WHERE mp2.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2) = 
    (SELECT es2.StyleID FROM Entertainer_Styles es2 WHERE es2.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND es2.StyleStrength = 2)
    
    OR
    
    -- Match first preference with second strength, second with first (reverse order)
    (SELECT mp1.StyleID FROM Musical_Preferences mp1 WHERE mp1.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND mp1.PreferenceSeq = 1) = 
    (SELECT es1.StyleID FROM Entertainer_Styles es1 WHERE es1.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND es1.StyleStrength = 2)
    AND
    (SELECT mp2.StyleID FROM Musical_Preferences mp2 WHERE mp2.CustomerID = c.CustomerID AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2) = 
    (SELECT es2.StyleID FROM Entertainer_Styles es2 WHERE es2.EntertainerID = e.EntertainerID AND es2.StyleStrength = 1)
)

SELECT DISTINCT e.EntStageName, c.CustLastName
FROM Entertainers e
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es1 ON e.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
JOIN Musical_Preferences mp1 ON mp1.CustomerID IN (
    SELECT mp2.CustomerID
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp2
    WHERE mp2.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
    GROUP BY mp2.CustomerID
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 3
)
JOIN Customers c ON mp1.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE es1.StyleStrength <= 3
  AND mp1.PreferenceSeq <= 3
  AND (
    (es1.StyleID = (
        SELECT mp2.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp2
        WHERE mp2.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 1
    ) AND (
        SELECT mp3.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp3
        WHERE mp3.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp3.PreferenceSeq = 2
    ) = (
        SELECT es2.StyleID
        FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
        WHERE es2.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
          AND es2.StyleStrength = 2
    ))
    OR
    (es1.StyleID = (
        SELECT mp2.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp2
        WHERE mp2.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2
    ) AND (
        SELECT mp3.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp3
        WHERE mp3.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp3.PreferenceSeq = 1
    ) = (
        SELECT es2.StyleID
        FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
        WHERE es2.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
          AND es2.StyleStrength = 2
    ))
  )
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
    WHERE es2.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
      AND es2.StyleStrength <= 3
    GROUP BY es2.EntertainerID
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 3
);

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.EntStageName, c.CustLastName
FROM Entertainers e
JOIN Entertainer_Styles es1 ON e.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
JOIN Musical_Preferences mp1 ON mp1.CustomerID IN (
    SELECT mp2.CustomerID
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp2
    WHERE mp2.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
    GROUP BY mp2.CustomerID
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 3
)
JOIN Customers c ON mp1.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE es1.StyleStrength <= 3
  AND mp1.PreferenceSeq <= 3
  AND (
    (es1.StyleID = (
        SELECT mp2.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp2
        WHERE mp2.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 1
    ) AND (
        SELECT mp3.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp3
        WHERE mp3.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp3.PreferenceSeq = 2
    ) = (
        SELECT es2.StyleID
        FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
        WHERE es2.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
          AND es2.StyleStrength = 2
    ))
    OR
    (es1.StyleID = (
        SELECT mp2.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp2
        WHERE mp2.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp2.PreferenceSeq = 2
    ) AND (
        SELECT mp3.StyleID
        FROM Musical_Preferences mp3
        WHERE mp3.CustomerID = mp1.CustomerID
          AND mp3.PreferenceSeq = 1
    ) = (
        SELECT es2.StyleID
        FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
        WHERE es2.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
          AND es2.StyleStrength = 2
    ))
  )
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Entertainer_Styles es2
    WHERE es2.EntertainerID = es1.EntertainerID
      AND es2.StyleStrength <= 3
    GROUP BY es2.EntertainerID
    HAVING COUNT(*) <= 3
);
